items.title: Three dead in suspected virus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship
items.dek: The World Health Organization said one case of hantavirus infection has been confirmed, with five more suspected cases under investigation.
items.body: The World Health Organization said one case of hantavirus infection has been confirmed, with five more suspected cases under investigation.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Iran says US has responded to its latest peace proposal
items.dek: Before reviewing the proposal on Saturday, US President Donald Trump said he could not imagine it "would be acceptable".
items.body: Before reviewing the proposal on Saturday, US President Donald Trump said he could not imagine it "would be acceptable".
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Police officer lowered into crocodile-infested river to recover human remains
items.dek: Police suspect the human remains belong to a businessman swept away by floodwater last week.
items.body: Police suspect the human remains belong to a businessman swept away by floodwater last week.
items.author: IriLine Desk
